findings.title: ADR-0006 contains a lazy reference 'NG-something equivalent' instead of citing the actual No-Go
findings.detail: Per append-only invariant, cannot edit the accepted ADR body. Appended an erratum section clarifying the reference points to SPRINT-2026-05-A §No-gos item 5: 'NOT migrating from Retell if R1 research suggests Vapi is marginally cheaper.'
findings.fix_sketch: Append erratum at end of ADR-0006 citing SPRINT-2026-05-A §No-gos item 5.

findings.title: Retell platform decision marked pending but architecture treats it as locked — no deadline for R1 confirmation
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md Q3 updated with explicit ACTION REQUIRED notice. R1 confirmation is now 10 days overdue. Added deadline note and escalation flag to the open question.
findings.fix_sketch: Add explicit deadline for R1 confirmation in ROADMAP.md open questions.

findings.title: RUNBOOK SLOs are TBD with no process to define them before first incident
findings.detail: Added minimal Factory SLOs table to RUNBOOK.md so operators know what thresholds trigger Sev 1/2/3 escalation before the first incident. Spec synthesis, IFleet pipeline, self-healing Tier 1/2, and Discord digest SLOs defined.
findings.fix_sketch: Add Factory SLOs section to RUNBOOK.md.

findings.title: Logging cross-cutting concern undefined — no schema, levels, or PII rules across per-client repos
findings.detail: Added minimal logging standard to ARCHITECTURE.md §6 Cross-Cutting Concerns, covering structured JSON logs to stdout, severity levels (ERROR/WARN/INFO/DEBUG), PII redaction fields, and Sentry + stdout dual-channel pattern.
findings.fix_sketch: Add minimal logging standard to ARCHITECTURE.md §6 cross-cutting concerns table.

findings.title: SPRINT-2026-05-B referenced in multiple files but never created — coordination repo has no active sprint
findings.detail: STATUS.md updated to reflect day-9 status of SPRINT-2026-05-B absence (overdue since 2026-05-21). This is a human decision requiring Sebastian + Esme alignment. Cannot be auto-created without fabricating scope.
findings.fix_sketch: Update STATUS.md with current date. SPRINT-B creation requires human action.

findings.title: ENV.md 'Last verified' date (2026-05-15) does not match 'last_updated' frontmatter (2026-05-26)
findings.detail: ENV.md frontmatter says last_updated: 2026-05-26 (when Stripe/Documenso vars were added) but the footer 'Last verified' still says 2026-05-15. Updated to 2026-05-30.
findings.fix_sketch: Update footer Last verified date to match last_updated.

findings.title: STATUS.md 'In flight' section references audit/nightly-2026-05-26 as push-pending — 4 days stale
findings.detail: The In-flight entry for audit/nightly-2026-05-26 was created on 2026-05-26 and references a push that has since completed. Updated STATUS.md to reflect the current nightly run.
findings.fix_sketch: Replace stale In-flight entry with current nightly audit branch.
